candidate_problem_record.subject: 数学、物理、生物、化学
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: As part of a community service program, students in three middle school grades (grade 6, grade 7, grade 8) each  chose to participate in one of three school-sponsored volunteer activities. The graph below shows the distribution for each class for the three activities. Based on the graph, which statement must be true?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。
